sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n14807" key="a)rgo/las" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀργόλας</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">α</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, a kind of <sense id="n14807.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">serpent,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl>; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀργῆς.</foreign> </sense> <sense n="II" id="n14807.1" level="2" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <abbr TEIform="abbr">v.</abbr> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Ἄργος·</orth> </sense> </entryFree>
